name: JellySTRMprobe
description: JellySTRMprobe extracts media information from STRM file targets by probing remote streams. Jellyfin never probes STRM files during library scans - this plugin fills that gap. Features: scheduled task to probe all unprobed STRM items, catch-up mode to auto-probe new STRM items as they are added, configurable parallelism/timeout/cooldown, and per-library selection.
overview: Probe STRM files to extract media info (codec, resolution, duration, audio)

versions.changelog:
- Catch-up mode now also reprobes newly added STRM items that already have media streams but a missing duration (RunTimeTicks null/0), matching the scheduled task's selection.
- Scheduled task also reprobes existing STRM items missing a duration.
